в”‚
в””в”Ђв”Ђ fyp-backend/
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ firebase.json
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ firestore.rules                             в†ђ Security rules (with rate_limits explicit deny, settings field validation)
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ firestore.indexes.json                      в†ђ Composite indexes: friend_requests, shared_inbox, custom_words, user_search, quiz_attempts
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .firebaserc
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ functions/
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ package.json
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ package-lock.json
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tsconfig.json
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tsconfig.dev.json
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .eslintrc.js
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ jest.config.js                          в†ђ Jest + ts-jest config for backend unit tests
        в””в”Ђв”Ђ src/
            в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index.ts                            в†ђ Slim entry point вЂ” re-exports all Cloud Functions
            в”њв”Ђв”Ђ helpers.ts                          в†ђ Shared helpers: auth, validation, rate limiting, secrets
            в”њв”Ђв”Ђ logger.ts                           в†ђ Structured JSON logging for Cloud Logging
            в”њв”Ђв”Ђ translation.ts                      в†ђ getSpeechToken, translateText(s), detectLanguage
            в”њв”Ђв”Ђ learning.ts                         в†ђ generateLearningContent (Azure OpenAI)
            в”њв”Ђв”Ђ coins.ts                            в†ђ awardQuizCoins (anti-cheat), spendCoins
            в”њв”Ђв”Ђ notifications.ts                    в†ђ FCM triggers: chat, friend request, accepted, shared inbox, feedback rate limit + spam detection
            в”њв”Ђв”Ђ maintenance.ts                      в†ђ Scheduled: pruneStaleTokens, pruneStaleRateLimits, repairFriendsData
            в”њв”Ђв”Ђ health.ts                           в†ђ Healthcheck HTTP endpoint (validates GenAI config)
            в””в”Ђв”Ђ __tests__/
                в”њв”Ђв”Ђ helpers.test.ts                 в†ђ 28 unit tests for validation helpers
                в”њв”Ђв”Ђ helpers-redaction.test.ts       в†ђ 5 unit tests for В§5.3.1 logUid/logChat hashing
                в”њв”Ђв”Ђ logger.test.ts                  в†ђ 6 unit tests for structured logger
                в”њв”Ђв”Ђ translation.test.ts             в†ђ 42 unit tests for getSpeechToken, translateText(s), detectLanguage
                в”њв”Ђв”Ђ coins.test.ts                   в†ђ 27 unit tests for awardQuizCoins and spendCoins
                в”њв”Ђв”Ђ notifications.test.ts           в†ђ 17 unit tests for FCM triggers and spam detection
                в”њв”Ђв”Ђ health.test.ts                  в†ђ Healthcheck endpoint tests
                в”њв”Ђв”Ђ rate-limit.test.ts              в†ђ Rate limiting validation tests
                в”њв”Ђв”Ђ learning.test.ts                в†ђ 20 unit tests for AI learning content generation callable
                в”њв”Ђв”Ђ learning-sync.test.ts           в†ђ 6 unit tests for learning sync operations
                в”њв”Ђв”Ђ maintenance.test.ts             в†ђ 9 unit tests for scheduled maintenance handlers
                в”њв”Ђв”Ђ maintenance-deep.test.ts        в†ђ 3 unit tests for deep maintenance tests
                в”њв”Ђв”Ђ notifications-deep.test.ts      в†ђ 11 unit tests for deep notification tests
                в”њв”Ђв”Ђ firestore-rules-settings.test.ts в†ђ 6 unit tests for Firestore security rules
                в””в”Ђв”Ђ index.test.ts                   в†ђ 2 unit tests for main entry point
